sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle"> <x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <city>Guangzhou</city> <country>China</country> <description>pharetra magna ac consequat metus sapien ut nunc vestibulum ante ipsum primis</description> <end_date/> <make>BYD</make> <model>Shark</model> <pin>6487</pin> <start_date>2025-06-01</start_date> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-02-17 04:54:06</sys_created_on> <sys_id>37840b66fd4b32107f44b9211467fe33</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-02-17 04:54:06</sys_updated_on> <vin>WAUUL78E76A421585</vin> <year>2025</year> </x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle> </record_update>
